payload.subject: MTA Capital Program

tool_args.label: Guiding principle: Maintain safety and functionality

payload.claim_text: Our guiding principle: Maintain safety and functionality
payload.description: Prioritization framework: Higher priority to state-of-good-repair projects for safe operations; case-by-case review for reliability; lower priority for expansion, accessibility above settlement, bus electrification, and upgrades. Special cases: projects with dedicated federal funding that cannot be re-purposed.

tool_args.label: Work to proceed: essential state of good repair

payload.claim_text: Work to proceed: Fundamental state of good repair, Select rolling stock purchases, Leveraged federal funding opportunities
Continue to manage the 2020-2024 Plan. Continue preparation for 2025-2029 Plan.

tool_args.label: Second Avenue Subway Phase 2 contracts deferred/shifted

payload.claim_text: Future Second Avenue Subway Phase 2 contracts to be deferred or shifted to the 2025-2029 Capital Plan.
The historic ADA settlement is predicated on full funding for the program – but includes provisions for downside scenarios exactly like this one.
23 subway stations deferred. Potential cancellation: LIRR Hollis & Forest Hills.
Both buses and depot charging infrastructure to be deferred. 250+ electric buses. Deferral of bus depot charging infrastructure.

Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge ramp reconstruction and main cable dehumidification. Public Address upgrades at 70+ stations. Track Intrusion initiatives. Potential cancellation: Metro-North Brewster Yard upgrades.
Future generation of subway cars. New CNG buses. Passenger and work locomotives for railroads.
Signal upgrades & state of good repair work to replace 1930s-era signals on the AC and BDFM lines to be deferred. Fulton Line AC. 6 Av Line and 63rd Street Tunnel BDFM.

tool_args.label: State of Good Repair deferral details

payload.claim_text: Less urgent work: 5 subway station renewals, Station component repairs, Various structural repairs. Back of house: Shops, yards, and depots. Employee facilities. Non-revenue vehicles and heavy maintenance equipment. Ventilation controls replacement.
